_comment: Folio legal docs manifest. Source of truth for the latest ToS / Privacy version: a GitHub Action syncs this into Supabase tos_versions (which the app reads), and it is also bundled into the app as an offline fallback. Bump version + summary when ToS / Privacy changes.

terms.summary_zh: v1.0：§10 清除產品版號用語；§15 變更分級調整為任何變更皆以阻擋式 modal 重新取得同意。
terms.summary_en: v1.0: §10 removed product-version wording; §15 change classification updated so any change requires re-consent via the blocking modal.

privacy.summary_zh: v1.0：§04／§05 更正 Supabase 主機所在地為新加坡；移除文件內 app 產品版號標註；§11 變更分級調整為任何變更皆以阻擋式 modal 重新取得同意。
privacy.summary_en: v1.0: §04/§05 corrected the Supabase host location to Singapore; removed app product-version tags from the document; §11 change classification updated so any change requires re-consent via the blocking modal.
